titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/234

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=197 status=live modified=2021-04-05 09:26:00.45545+00 | translation moa=196 status=live modified=2021-04-05 09:26:02.113494+00

div.p:
Christianus dei gratia candide case episcopus uniuersis sacro sancte matris ecclesie filiis clericis  laicis presen
tibus  futuris salutem . Vniuersitati uestre notificetur me concessisse .  hac carta mea confirmas
se . deo  ecclesie sancte crucis de edenb’ .  canonicis ibidem deo seruientibus . ecclesiam sancte marie  sancti bruoc de dunrod . in liberam  perpetuam elemosinam cum omnibus rectitudinibus  pertinenciis
suis saluo iure episcopali .  ecclesiam de tuignam cum omnibus rectitudinibus  pertinenciis suis . hac
eadem etiam karta confirmo donationem fergussi  huct’ filii eius de tota uilla de dun
rodde . per recctas diuisas suas cum omnibus iustis pertinentiis  rectitudinibus suis .  ut melius  plenarius karte ipsorum testantur . Teste Willelmo abbate de dundrainan . Io
hanne archidiacono . Gilleberto capellano . Iacobo persona de creuecoer Roberto pres
bitero filio dolfin . Macraith . de ospitali . Malbet nepote episcopi . Valtero fratre eius .
Nicholao . Iacobo nepotibus episcopi . Willelmo de kertmel . Gilleberto dapifero episcopi .
Bran . filio macgillegunnin . Arnaldo hostiario . Adam de ele .

p.cl: Christian, by the grace of God bishop of Candida Casa [Whithorn], to all sons of the most holy Mother Church, clerk and lay, present and future, Greeting:

You should all be notified that I have granted, and by this my charter have made firm, to God and to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh, and to the canons serving God there, the church of St Mary and St Bruoc of Dunrod, in free and perpetual alms with all its revenues and pertinents, reserving episcopal right, and the church of Twynholm, with all its revenues and pertinents. I also confirm by this same charter the donation of Fergus and his son Uhtred of the whole toun of Dunrod by its correct bounds, with all its rightful pertinents and revenues, and as their own charters the better and more fully bear witness.

As witness, William abbot of Dundrennan, John the archdeacon, Gilbert the chaplain, James the parson of Troqueer, Robert the priest, son of Dolfin, Mac Raith of Spittal, Máel Bethad the bishop’s nephew, Walter his brother, Nicholas [and] James the bishop’s nephews, William of Cartmel, Gilbert the bishop’s steward, Bran son of Macgillegunnin, Arnold the doorward, Adam de Ele.
